meta.title: VerveQ Football Records — Quiz Questions
meta.difficultyRule: easy = iconic #1-holder of a headline record (smallest bucket); intermediate = engaged-fan knowledge / #2-3 / title counts; hard = exact figures, deep ranks, niche competitions.
meta.volatileNote: Questions with volatile:true derive from facts that change during the 2026 World Cup (and active-player career/caps/goals). Phrased 'as of June 2026'. Re-verify after the WC final.
meta.explanationNote: DEFERRED: quiz questions intentionally carry NO explanation field for now — revisit later if explanations are wanted.
meta.schemaNote: Maps to convex quizQuestions: sport, category, question, options, correctAnswer, difficulty. factId/subcategory/volatile are extra provenance fields for the seeding step.
